zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara於1356年出生在義大利維圖帕多瓦時，她的父親Francesco I Da Carrara31歲，母親Adelheid of Öttingen23歲。她和Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1430年在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格札納享年74歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara于1356年出生在意大利維圖帕多瓦时，她的父亲Francesco I Da Carrara31岁，母亲Adelheid of Öttingen23岁。她和Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1430年在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格札納享年74岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-安哈爾特藍德可萊斯 維騰格。

nameMeanings.name: da
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 達, said to be derived from the personal name Shu Da (叔達), a talent during the reign of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437  BC ); or adopted as a Han surname by other minority ethnic groups.
Mandarin form of the surname 笪, a surname originating in ancient Jianzhou (located in present-day Fujian province) and Jurong (located in Jiangsu province) or a surname from the Hui ethnic group.

nameMeanings.name: Carrara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Guido, Angelo, Alessandro, Amerigo, Antonio, Arrigo, Carlo, Enzo, Gaetano, Giovanni, Guerino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of various places called Carrara, from Latin carraria ‘quarry’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

nameMeanings.name: Gigliola
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Flavio, Rocco, Veto, Vito.

Italian: diminutive of Figlia, from ‘daughter, girl’, Latin filia, perhaps used to distinguish a mother and daughter bearing the same personal name, or from a female short form of a compound name formed with the element -figlio (‘son, boy’), such as Bonfiglio .

variants.name: Bonfiglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Antonio, Aldo, Alessia, Carmelina, Filomena, Francesco, Gaetano, Lucio, Nino, Santo.
Italian: from the personal name Bonfiglio, an omen or well-wishing name meaning ‘good son’.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara was born in 1356, in Padova, Veneto, Italy, her father, Francesco I Da Carrara, was 31 and her mother, Adelheid of Öttingen, was 23. She had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur. She died in 1430, in Zahna, Wittenberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 74, and was buried in Wittenberg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara est née en 1356, à Padova, Veneto, Italie, son père, Francesco I Da Carrara, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Adelheid of Öttingen, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Zahna, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterrée à Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara 1356 in Padova, Veneto, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Francesco I Da Carrara 31 und ihre Mutter Adelheid of Öttingen 23. Sie hatte mit Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Zahna, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara è nata il nel 1356 nel Padova, Veneto, Italia, sua padre, Francesco I Da Carrara, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Adelheid of Öttingen, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur. Morì nel 1430, nel Zahna, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolta a Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Gigliola da Carraraが1356年にイタリアベンエトープアドヴァで生まれた時，父Francesco I Da Carraraは31歳，母Adelheid of Öttingenは23歳であった。彼女はWenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lüneburとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1430年にドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグザナで74歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-アンハルトランドクレイス ウィッテンバーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara(이)가 1356년 이탈리아 븐토 파도바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Francesco I Da Carrara(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid of Öttingen(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1430년 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그 자h나에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-아할트 랜드크레이스 윗텐버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara nasceu em 1356, em Padova, Veneto, Itália, seu pai, Francesco I Da Carrara, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid of Öttingen, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Zahna, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 74 anos, e foi sepultada em Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara родилась в 1356 г. в местности падова, винето, Италия, её отцу по имени Francesco I Da Carrara было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Adelheid of Öttingen, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности захна, ландкрис виттенбирг, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 74 лет и была похоронена в местности ландкрис виттенбирг, сачсен-анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Gigliola da Carrara nació en 1356, en Padova, Veneto, Italia, su papá, Francesco I Da Carrara, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Adelheid of Öttingen, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Wenceslas von Sachsen-Wittenberg, I, Herzog, Kurfürst zu Sachsen, Herzog zu Braunschweig-Lünebur. Murió en 1430, en Zahna, Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultada en Landkreis Wittenberg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania.
